projectName: Neon Ronin Stage 1 v7 - Cutaway Collision Candidate

surfaces.notes: Front edge of the wet stone street and retaining wall.
Broad supported stone rise between the opening street terraces.
Continuous wet stone coping before the tall sign stair.
Visible monumental stone stair climbing to the sign tower crown.
Upper stone terrace carried by two deep masonry arches.
Drop landing at the supported market-entry stone gallery.
Upper market route across connected timber galleries and roof fascia.
Visible diagonal stair linking the market's upper, middle, and lower floors.
Middle market floor with continuous beams, posts, and rooms beneath.
Optional lower market landing above the cutaway foundation level.
Stone roof terrace immediately before the drainage descent.
Masonry stair descending from the market to the canal bank.
Continuous drainage-bank top carried by deep stone arches.
Lowest visible timber floor inside the cutaway climb tower.
Lower-mid timber landing inside the cutaway climb tower.
Middle landing aligned to the drain-bank entrance.
Upper-mid timber landing in the cutaway tower.
Top tower room floor before the supported high gallery.
Upper left masonry wall of the vertical cutaway climb, leaving a playable entry below.
Lower right masonry wall of the vertical cutaway climb, leaving a playable exit to the high gallery.
High covered gallery floor supported by large arches and piers.
Upper supported gate-approach stair.
Lower broad stair descending into the Warden forecourt.
Front physical edge of the wet-stone Warden arena and Moon Gate threshold.
